translations.en: Seggallion
translations.zh: 塞加里昂

translations.en: a huge, muscled warrior with a sad look in his eyes.
translations.zh: 高大魁梧之武士，眼中帶著一絲哀愁。

translations.en: He looks at you imploringly.
translations.zh: 他用懇求的目光看著你。

translations.en: "What is it?"
translations.zh: 「何事？」

translations.en: "Seggallion of...well now that won't mean anything to you."
translations.zh: 「塞加里昂，來自……這地名對你毫無意義。」

translations.en: "If you mean my profession, I would have to say a knight of @Ashtalarea."
translations.zh: 「若問我的職業，我當說是@Ashtalarea的騎士。」

translations.en: "A land @unfamiliar to you, I'm sure. Just as unfamiliar as yours is to me."
translations.zh: 「一片對你而言@unfamiliar的土地，正如你的故土對我同樣陌生。」

translations.en: "Yes, I was walking in the mountains of @Tyme when suddenly I heard a noise."
translations.zh: 「是的，我正行走於@Tyme山中，忽然聽到一陣聲響。」

translations.en: "It was dark and I heard this low growling."
translations.zh: 「四周漆黑，我聽見低沉的咆哮聲。」

translations.en: "Having just been released from @Pildar's clutches, I was tired and hungry."
translations.zh: 「方才脫離@Pildar的魔爪，我既疲憊又飢餓。」

translations.en: "That is a great range of mountains in my land. Wherever that is now."
translations.zh: 「那是我故鄉一道巨大的山脈。只是現在不知故鄉在何處了。」

translations.en: "From what I hear, he is not unlike your Mondain."
translations.zh: 「據我所聞，他與汝等的蒙丹頗為相似。」

translations.en: "Anyway, I peered into the darkness but could see nothing."
translations.zh: 「總之，我望向黑暗之中，卻什麼也看不見。」

translations.en: "Suddenly a huge wall of @blue flame appeared behind me."
translations.zh: 「忽然，一道巨大的@blue火牆在我身後現出。」

translations.en: "Yes, blue like nothing I had seen in any spell."
translations.zh: 「是的，那種藍色是我從未在任何法術中見過的。」

translations.en: "Anyway, just as I turned, the creature leapt from the woods."
translations.zh: 「總之，就在我轉身之際，那生靈從林中躍出。」

translations.en: "It hit me with such force, we both @entered the blue flame together."
translations.zh: 「牠撞上我時力道極猛，我們兩個一同@entered那藍色火焰。」

translations.en: "Well, it didn't burn us, we just fell through to the ground beyond it."
translations.zh: 「然而火焰並未燃燒我們，只是穿過去跌落到另一邊的地面。」

translations.en: "After struggling for a while, I finally managed to kill it."
translations.zh: 「搏鬥一番之後，我終於將牠殺死。」

translations.en: "That's when I wandered into this @community."
translations.zh: 「就是那時，我流浪至此@community。」

translations.en: "The people of this land are brave and honorable."
translations.zh: 「此地之人勇敢且正直。」

translations.en: "They fed and clothed me when I discovered that my gold was not the same as yours."
translations.zh: 「當我發現自己的金幣與你們的不通用時，他們給我食物和衣物。」

translations.en: "I know it is a @queer story, but true none the less."
translations.zh: 「我知道這是個@queer離奇的故事，但千真萬確。」

translations.en: "Yes it is. Still, if I could I would like to join you on your quest."
translations.zh: 「確實如此。儘管如此，若有可能，我希望加入你的試煉。」

translations.en: "Perhaps one of the people in your land will know how to get me back to mine."
translations.zh: 「也許你們這裡的人知道如何送我回故鄉。」

translations.en: "If not, at least I can thank your people by assisting you."
translations.zh: 「若不然，我至少可以藉助汝等之力，以此答謝你們的恩情。」

translations.en: "Farewell."
translations.zh: 「再會。」

translations.en: "That's one on me. 'Tain't never heard o' that."
translations.zh: 「這下被你難倒了。從未聽聞此事。」

translations.en: "You don't look seperated to me." He laughs heartily.
translations.zh: 「你看起來並未與人分離嘛。」他朗聲大笑。

translations.en: "Not while you're in that thing!"
translations.zh: 「只要你還在那裡頭，就不行！」

translations.en: "I wish I could, however, you seem to have enough strong arms already."
translations.zh: 「吾倒是願意，只是你似乎已有足夠的壯丁了。」

translations.en: "If any should leave though, seek me out."
translations.zh: 「若有人離隊，還望來找我。」

translations.en: He bows low. "Seggallion at your service."
translations.zh: 他深深一鞠躬。「塞加里昂，隨時效命。」

translations.en: You can see by his broad smile and large physique, he would be a worthy opponent.
translations.zh: 從他寬闊的笑容與龐大的體格可以看出，他將是一位強勁的對手。

translations.en: "Shall we be off then?"
translations.zh: 「那我們出發吧？」

translations.en: "Am I standing in your light? Sorry."
translations.zh: 「我擋到你的光了嗎？抱歉。」

translations.en: "Could we at least wait till we get back to shore?"
translations.zh: 「至少等我們回到岸上再說吧？」

translations.en: "I'll leave all these things with you."
translations.zh: 「這些東西就全留給你了。」

translations.en: "It is hard to say goodbye, but I see your path leads elsewhere, so..."
translations.zh: 「道別實難，然汝的路通向他方，所以……」

translations.en: "You have a question?"
translations.zh: 「你有問題？」

translations.en: "Seggallion. You can call me 'Segg' though."
translations.zh: 「塞加里昂。不過你可以叫我『塞格』。」

translations.en: He looks at you puzzled. "The same as yours now."
translations.zh: 他一臉困惑地望著你。「現在與你一樣。」

translations.en: "Ask me again sometime. It is quite a story."
translations.zh: 「改天再問我吧。這可是段很長的故事。」

translations.en: "Farewell."
translations.zh: 「再會。」

translations.en: He leans a bit closer. "What was that?"
translations.zh: 他靠近一些。「你說什麼？」

translator_notes: 塞加里昂為來自異世界的騎士，口吻正直坦率帶異鄉感。@blue/@entered/@community/@queer/@unfamiliar/@Tyme/@Pildar/@Ashtalarea 均保留 keyword 觸發前綴。
